paragraphs: I am a full-stack developer based in Tbilisi, Georgia, focused on building production-ready web platforms with clean interfaces, reliable APIs, and scalable product flows.

My recent work includes AI-powered resume builders, resume ingestion pipelines, multi-frontend SaaS ecosystems, subscription billing, dashboards, social commerce features, authentication, search, filtering, and performance optimization.

workExperience.name: Skilllynk
workExperience.summary: Staff management platform with resume management and AI-assisted profile creation workflows.
workExperience.impact: Processed 10+ resume types with a 90% success rate and improved AI-assisted profile creation accuracy by 10%.
bullets: Built resume management for users to create, customize, and maintain professional resumes.
Implemented NestJS PDF ingestion and text extraction for AI-ready profile processing.
Delivered traditional and chronological timeline resume presentation formats.

workExperience.name: ResumeAI
workExperience.summary: AI-driven resume builder with multi-phase data capture, 4 layouts, editable outputs, Stripe subscriptions, quotas, and dashboards.
workExperience.impact: Reduced incomplete submissions by 40% and supported tier-specific AI limits up to 500 requests per month.
bullets: Architected end-to-end resume generation with editable final content.
Integrated Stripe subscriptions and server-side webhooks for billing synchronization.
Built user and admin dashboards for credits, billing cycles, revenue, and growth metrics.

workExperience.name: Lernicle (Vrep)
workExperience.summary: Education SaaS platform serving Admins, Owners, Teachers, and Pupils with onboarding, email verification, multi-tenancy, and reusable UI components.
workExperience.impact: Increased school owner onboarding efficiency by 30% and accelerated frontend feature delivery by 25%.
bullets: Architected flows for Admins, Owners, Teachers, and Pupils.
Built multi-step registration with automated email verification.
Helped migrate the backend toward modular-monolithic Nest.js, Prisma, and MySQL architecture.

workExperience.name: Deedsgood
workExperience.summary: Social e-commerce product with posting, browsing, purchasing, authentication, product listings, real-time updates, search, filtering, and pagination.
workExperience.impact: Served 5K+ active users, reduced query response times by 30%, and decreased page load times by 35%.
bullets: Completed 12+ MERN features including authentication, product listings, and real-time updates.
Delivered JWT authentication with 99.9% system uptime.
Improved product discovery with filtering, pagination, and search.

personalProjects.title: Xstore
personalProjects.description: Xstore is an ecommerce platform for browsing and buying tech products. Users can search, filter, favorite products, add items to cart, and complete a fake purchase flow. The experience focuses on clear product discovery, simple shopping actions, and a polished checkout journey.

personalProjects.title: Instakilo
personalProjects.description: Instakilo is a social media app inspired by Instagram. Users can create posts, like, comment, save, share, tag people, add stories, message others, and receive notifications. It also includes story and post archiving, user search, explore pages, and rich social interactions.

personalProjects.title: Evently
personalProjects.description: Evently is an event booking system for discovering events and buying tickets. Users can sign in, manage profiles, reset forgotten passwords, favorite events, and view booked events. Admins can create and edit events, while sold-out dates and unavailable tickets are handled clearly.

personalProjects.title: AI Chat
personalProjects.description: AI Chat is a realtime AI messaging app where users can log in and continue saved conversations later. Answers stream live, and the assistant uses previous conversation context for better responses. The experience is built around fast chat, persistent history, and natural follow-up questions.

personalProjects.title: Moviefy
personalProjects.description: Moviefy is a movie discovery page built quickly with Codex. Users can view featured movies, search by name, and open movie detail pages with actors, trailers, reviews, and image galleries. Clicking an image opens a modal carousel for browsing movie visuals.

caseStudies.title: AI resume workflow
caseStudies.summary: Built resume creation, PDF ingestion, structured data extraction, editable outputs, layout selection, and AI-assisted profile generation workflows.

caseStudies.title: SaaS platform delivery
caseStudies.summary: Delivered multi-persona SaaS flows, reusable UI architecture, registration improvements, and multi-tenant backend migration support.
